name: signal-meetings
description: Signal Meetings — an AI Meeting-to-Execution Operator (prototype).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @signal/core && npm run build -w @signal/server && npm run build -w @signal/web
scripts.dev: npm run build:core && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @signal/server" "npm run dev -w @signal/web"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:core && npm run dev -w @signal/server
scripts.test: npm run test -w @signal/core && npm run test -w @signal/server
